recovery_tier_note: ALS is source-backed and experimentally anchored by Drosophila rescue, but the current first-wave benchmark should treat those rescue outcomes as evaluation labels only, not discovery-time features.

source.title: Identification of Therapeutic Targets for Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis Using PandaOmics
source.note: KCNB2 was one of eight previously unreported genes reported to rescue neurodegeneration in the Drosophila C9ORF72 ALS model.

forbidden_feature_leakage: later validation interpretation from the same paper
